landing.badge: AI Writing Coach · IELTS-grade feedback in 30 seconds
landing.headline: Your AI English coach for
landing.subheadline: Drop in a diary entry, an essay, or an email. InkPath returns an IELTS band score, line-by-line corrections, an advanced rewrite, and new vocabulary — in under 30 seconds. Improve your English by writing about what actually matters to you.
landing.feature1Desc: Four-layer analysis on every entry: a 0-9 band score, line-by-line corrections, a band-up rewrite, and extracted vocabulary — all calibrated to official IELTS rubrics.
landing.feature2Desc: Most platforms only score canned IELTS prompts. InkPath works on anything — your diary, your reflections, your real emails. Practice English on what you actually care about.
landing.feature3Desc: Every rewrite extracts useful expressions and saves them to your notebook by CEFR level. Spaced repetition makes sure they end up in your active writing.
landing.feature4Desc: Your writing is yours. End-to-end encryption, no training on your data, one-click export and deletion. We built InkPath because we wanted it to exist for ourselves.
landing.step1Desc: A diary entry, a reflection, an IELTS essay, an email to your boss. Any topic, any length, any mode.
landing.step2Desc: Band score, error corrections, an advanced rewrite, and new vocabulary — all returned in under 30 seconds.
landing.step3Desc: Watch your band score climb week over week and your vocabulary notebook fill up with the words you actually use.
landing.privacyDesc: Journaling requires absolute trust. InkPath uses end-to-end encryption — your entries are encrypted before they leave your device. We literally cannot read them, and we never train on them.
landing.privacyBullet2: Zero training on your personal data
landing.privacyBullet4: Open data — your writing belongs to you
landing.maxFeature2: Premium AI (deeper analysis with Claude Opus)

write.title: What's on your mind?
write.placeholder: Start writing... A diary entry, an observation, a reflection, an essay — anything you want to express.

vocabulary.title: Your Vocabulary
vocabulary.noWords: Your vocabulary notebook is empty. Start writing to build it up!
